{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "martijnperdaan52", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/268664750?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/martijnperdaan52", "id": 268664750, "login": "martijnperdaan52", "node_id": "U_kgDOEAN_rg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/martijnperdaan52", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55984", "cvss": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Summary

The AddTime API handler continues execution after an error returned by `GetUserByName()`.

When a repository administrator specifies a non-existent user name, an error response is generated but execution does not stop. Subsequent code dereferences a nil user pointer, resulting in a runtime panic.

### Details

Affected endpoint:

```http
POST /api/v1/repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/{index}/times
```

Affected file:

```text
routers/api/v1/repo/issue_tracked_time.go
```

Relevant code:

```go
user, err = user_model.GetUserByName(ctx, form.User)
if err != nil {
    ctx.APIErrorInternal(err)
    // missing return
}
```

Execution continues to:

```go
trackedTime, err := issues_model.AddTime(
    ctx,
    user,
    issue,
    form.Time,
    created,
)
```

When `GetUserByName()` fails, `user` is nil.

The subsequent call dereferences the nil pointer and triggers a runtime panic.

### Proof of Concept

Using a repository administrator account:

```http
POST /api/v1/repos/owner/repo/issues/1/times
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "time": 3600,
  "user_name": "nonexistent_user_xyz"
}
```

Result:

```text
HTTP 500
runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
```

The stack trace indicates execution reaches the AddTime code path with a nil user object.

### Impact

An authenticated repository administrator can repeatedly trigger server-side panics through the affected endpoint.

Depending on deployment configuration and panic recovery behavior, this may result in request failures, stack trace disclosure, excessive log generation, or degraded service availability.

### Suggested Fix

Add a return statement after the error response:

```go
user, err = user_model.GetUserByName(ctx, form.User)
if err != nil {
    ctx.APIErrorInternal(err)
    return
}
```
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m932-crvm-gcp5", "html_url": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-m932-crvm-gcp5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m932-crvm-gcp5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55984"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-13T17:33:28Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/75789103?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bircni", "id": 75789103, "login": "bircni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc1Nzg5MTAz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bircni", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "low", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Null Pointer Dereference in AddTime API Causes Authenticated Denial of Service", "updated_at": "2026-07-13T17:33:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-m932-crvm-gcp5", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "patched_versions": "1.27.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.26.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Null Pointer Dereference in AddTime API Causes Authenticated Denial of Service
